## Purpose

Describe the public problem addressed and why this change is needed.

## Scope

- Files changed:
- Behaviour or documentation changed:
- Explicitly out of scope:

## Validation

List the dataset-free commands or manual checks performed.

```text
python scripts/validate_publication.py
```

## Publication-safety checklist

- [ ] No source, processed, split, derived, sample, or participant-level data is included.
- [ ] No credentials, private keys, provider access files, or restricted data-dictionary content is included.
- [ ] The preserved notebooks were not executed, edited, cleared, renamed, reformatted, or regenerated.
- [ ] Historical metrics, charts, outputs, and scientific wording were not silently changed.
- [ ] New claims are supported and clearly distinguished from preserved notebook results.
- [ ] Public links and licence boundaries remain accurate.
- [ ] The publication validator passes.

## Responsible-use impact

Explain whether this change affects privacy, clinical-use boundaries, explainability interpretation, subgroup reporting, or dataset access guidance. Write `None` only when none of those areas is affected.
